expectations.text: Uses AnimatePresence for exit animation support

expectations.evidence: Lines 20-22: initial/animate/exit opacity on backdrop motion.div

expectations.text: Modal uses scale from 0.9 with spring transition
expectations.evidence: Lines 29-37: scale: 0.9 initial, type: "spring", stiffness: 400, damping: 25

expectations.text: Has exit prop for unmount animation

expectations.evidence: Line 24: onClick={onClose} on backdrop, Line 38: e.stopPropagation() on modal

expectations.text: Uses per-property transitions (spring for scale, tween for opacity)
expectations.evidence: Uses single spring transition for all properties without per-property differentiation. Opacity animates with spring instead of tween.
